/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/aquamarine.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libaquamarine.so.11 -o libaquamarine.so.0.12.1
